scripts.preinstall: node -e "const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; if(!ua.includes('pnpm')){console.error('Use pnpm instead of npm/yarn.'); process.exit(1)}"
scripts.ci:quality: pnpm lint && pnpm type-check && pnpm test
scripts.test:all: pnpm lint && pnpm type-check && pnpm test
scripts.docker:all:up: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --profile core --profile search-optional up -d
scripts.docker:all:down: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --profile core --profile search-optional down
scripts.docker:zoekt:up: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --profile core --profile zoekt-optional up -d code-intel-mcp zoekt-webserver
scripts.docker:zoekt:index: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --profile zoekt-optional run --rm zoekt-index
scripts.docker:zoekt:down: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --profile core --profile zoekt-optional down
